source: ADR-004 (Language-to-Homeland Mapping) + ADR-005 (Placeholder Skill Disambiguation) + ADR-0014 (Source-Backed Skill Disambiguation and Passion Structure)
note: Documents the disambiguation option lists and native language mappings used when resolving (any)/(local)/(any other), descriptive placeholder skills, and ADR-0014 bare specialization-required skill labels. Language options are Glorantha-specific from Adventures in Glorantha cultures. Craft/Lore/Art options are from Mythras Core professional skills descriptions p.45-54.

Language.description: Culture-specific language options for Language (any) resolution
Language.source: Adventures in Glorantha p.26-41 culture descriptions

Lore.description: Common Lore specializations for Lore (any) resolution
Lore.source: Mythras Core p.49 + Adventures in Glorantha cultural context

Art.description: Common Art specializations for Art (any) resolution

Craft.description: Common Craft specializations for Craft (any)/(Primary)/(Secondary) resolution

Culture.description: Culture specializations — dynamically populated from available cultures
Culture.options: Populated at runtime from CULTURES_DATA names

Healing.description: Species specializations for Healing (Specific Species) in Beast Handler/Herder careers
Healing.source: Adventures in Glorantha Praxian culture (herd beasts) + Mythras Core p.48

Teach.description: Species specializations for Teach (Specific Species) in Beast Handler career
Teach.source: Same as Healing — training specific animal species

Navigation.description: Specific region or environment options for bare Navigation and Navigation placeholders
Navigation.source: Mythras Core p.50 states Navigation requires a specific region or environment; options are bounded to current Gloranthan play regions and common environments.

Musicianship.description: Instrument or performance-mode options for bare Musicianship
Musicianship.source: Mythras Core p.50 Musicianship is a professional skill; options are common performance specializations used for character-facing resolution.

Mysticism.description: Mystical path options for bare Mysticism
Mysticism.source: references/mythras-raw/mysticism.json: each Mysticism skill incidence is tied to a specific path.

Invocation.description: Wellspring options for bare Invocation when no cult, school, or grimoire context is available
Invocation.source: references/mythras-raw/sorcery.json: each Invocation incidence must be assigned to a specific wellspring of sorcery.

bare_specialization_required_skills.description: Character-facing bare skill labels that must be resolved before final/export; source/reference metadata may still use them as category labels.

resolved_bare_base_skills.description: Bare base skills that are complete character-facing skills and must not be treated as unresolved solely because related parenthetical forms exist.

normalization_only_parentheticals.description: Parenthetical forms whose qualifier is source/context metadata, not a character-facing specialization.

structured_passion_policy.description: Passion types that require an explicit subject in structured player/agent input.

native_language_mapping.description: Maps each AiG culture to its native tongue (the language automatically assigned at cultural skill base value)
native_language_mapping.source: Adventures in Glorantha p.26-41 culture descriptions + ADR-004
